description: Set up systemd user services for reliable process management

userStories.title: Set up systemd user services for control-plane, slack-relay, and scheduler
userStories.description: As the operator, I want claw-orchestrator services managed by systemd so there are no zombie processes, port conflicts, or restart loops.
acceptanceCriteria: Create 3 systemd user service files in deploy/systemd/ (or ~/.config/systemd/user/): claw-control-plane.service, claw-slack-relay.service, claw-scheduler.service

Control plane service: ExecStart=node apps/control-plane/dist/index.js, WorkingDirectory=/home/ubuntu/.openclaw/workspace/claw-orchestrator, EnvironmentFile pointing to .env, Restart=on-failure, RestartSec=5
Slack relay service: same pattern, After=claw-control-plane.service so it starts after control plane
Scheduler service: same pattern, independent ordering

Environment file at deploy/systemd/claw-orchestrator.env with all required env vars in systemd-compatible format (KEY=value, no export, no inline comments). Include: CONTROL_PLANE_PORT=3200, SLACK_RELAY_PORT=3101, DATABASE_URL, DATA_DIR, TENANT_IMAGE, TEMPLATES_DIR, SLACK_SIGNING_SECRET, SLACK_BOT_TOKEN, CONTROL_PLANE_URL, SCHEDULER_INTERVAL_MS, IDLE_STOP_HOURS, LOG_LEVEL, NODE_ENV=production

Create scripts/install-systemd.sh that: copies service files to ~/.config/systemd/user/, copies env file, runs loginctl enable-linger ubuntu, runs systemctl --user daemon-reload, enables and starts all 3 services
Create scripts/stop-services.sh that stops all 3 via systemctl --user stop
Update scripts/start-services.sh to use systemctl --user start (not nohup node)
After install: systemctl --user status claw-control-plane shows active (running)
After install: systemctl --user status claw-slack-relay shows active (running)
After install: curl http://localhost:3200/health returns ok
After install: curl http://localhost:3101/health returns ok
Kill any existing zombie/orphan node dist/index.js processes before installing
userStories.notes: Use systemd USER services (not system-level) to match OpenClaw gateway pattern. The working directory is /home/ubuntu/.openclaw/workspace/claw-orchestrator. Node binary is at /usr/bin/node or use the full path from which node. SLACK_SIGNING_SECRET=<from .env> and SLACK_BOT_TOKEN=<from .env>.
